prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约565名→578名→1336名→819名→732名。2023年出现明显位次后移（1336名），2024年回升至819名，2025年进一步回升至732名，近两年呈收窄趋稳态势；2025年基准位次约732名；该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年97人、2022年96人、2023年92人、2024年92人、2025年92人；2026年计划83人，较2025年缩招约9.8%，缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争加剧、位次数字减小（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第15名→2024年第12名→2025年第11名→2026年第11名，稳居全国Top15顶尖工科院校行列；2026年高考周期内，北航声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及杨昀导师师德失范与学术不端事件（顶格处理），引发社会关注，可能对部分考生的报考意愿产生一定抑制效应；抖音热度排名第56位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度尚可；历史投档异常记录未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，北航A-及以上学科多达16个，其中航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、仪器科学与技术获评A+，控制科学与工程、信息与通信工程、机械工程、外国语言文学获评A，实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"状态，与北航优势学科高度契合；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约167,000人，按近年物理类占比约68%估算，物理类考生约113,894人，较2025年117,407人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；北航位于北京市，属全国性顶尖高校，对黑龙江省考生吸引力稳定；该校在黑龙江省理科招生占比极小（约0.07%），地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次732名、2026年缩招约9.8%、声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考意愿、考生总数略有下降等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次；预测最低位次约704名，区间624–784名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 565 → 578 → 1336 → 819 → 732. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift in ranking (1336), which recovered to 819 in 2024 and further to 732 in 2025, showing a narrowing and stabilizing trend in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 732; the enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for science (physics category) was: 97 in 2021, 96 in 2022, 92 in 2023, 92 in 2024, and 92 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 83, a reduction of about 9.8% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large reduction, theoretically intensifying competition and reducing the ranking number (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been continuously rising, from 15th in 2021 to 12th in 2024, 11th in 2025, and 11th in 2026, firmly among the top 15 top engineering universities in China; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Beihang's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving the teacher Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic integrity incident (maximum punishment), which has attracted social attention and may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, overall attention is acceptable; no obvious gap signals in historical submission records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Beihang has as many as 16 disciplines rated A- or above, among which Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Instrument Science and Technology are rated A+, while Control Science and Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Foreign Languages and Literatures are rated A, with extremely strong strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been in a state of 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' from 2024 to 2026, highly consistent with Beihang's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is approximately 167,000, with an estimated 113,894 candidates in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 68%, a slight decrease from 117,407 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; Beihang is located in Beijing, a national top university, with stable attraction for candidates from Heilongjiang Province; the university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province for science is extremely small (about 0.07%), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 732, a 9.8% enrollment reduction in 2026, the negative reputation event possibly suppressing some application willingness, and a slight decrease in total candidates, the predicted lowest admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 704, with a range of 624–784.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 704 (range 624–784). Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (624) are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Future Aerospace Leading Plan, Artificial Intelligence, Computing and Intelligent Science Category); candidates with rankings in the middle range (approximately 650–730) should primarily fill Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1 sprints; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (784) should mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options while striving for Tier 2 medium majors. Beihang has extremely strong disciplinary strength, with all tiers of majors supported by A-class disciplines. It is recommended to combine personal interests and career plans for a reasonable match.
